User story: As a signed-out user, I want June to block the main app until I sign in so my account-backed features are tied to an OS Accounts identity.
Expected behavior: App shows the sign-in gate while account status is signed out, starts OS Accounts login from the primary action, cancels cleanly when needed, and does not flash the gate while loading.
Test status: Automated pass; browser smoke pass; live account manual pending
Notes: Inventory from code. Headless Chrome rendered the sign-in/onboarding gate at http://127.0.0.1:1421/. Mocked settings tests cover sign-in start, cancel, and sign-out actions; live OS Accounts login/callback still needs a signed-in account/environment.

User story: As a signed-in user with no spendable credits, I want June to send me to account funding without asking for a card before first use.
Expected behavior: App lets signed-in users with starting credits enter the product, blocks only known zero-credit accounts without a live subscription, opens OS Accounts for credits or billing, and refreshes account state after portal updates.
Test status: Automated pass; live account manual pending
Notes: Automated tests cover credit-based funding decisions, the add-credits gate, past-due billing, portal reopen/check flows, sign-out, polling, and onboarding absence of card-trial prompts. Live OS Accounts funding completion still needs a signed-in account/environment.

User story: As a user, I want login, callback handling, cancellation, and logout to be reliable.
Expected behavior: OS Accounts login opens the auth flow, deep-link callback stores tokens, cancel stops an in-flight flow, logout clears local auth and returns to signed-out behavior.
Test status: Automated pass; live account manual pending
Notes: Mocked settings tests cover login start, cancellation, logout, and local account state updates. Live OS Accounts callback/token persistence still needs a signed-in account/environment.

User story: As a signed-in user, I want to see billing status and manage credits or subscription details.
Expected behavior: Billing settings show account status, balance or membership state where available, Add funds opens OS Accounts credit funding, portal opens account management, and refresh updates account state.
Test status: Automated pass; live account manual pending
Notes: Mocked settings tests cover Add funds, Manage subscription, Refresh balance, and local-dev hiding. Live OS Accounts funding completion still needs a signed-in environment.

Defect status: Fixed: root API test script now uses june-api Rust toolchain
